title: hordelymus europaeus
intro: Hordelymus europaeus, also known as timber grass or wood melick, is a perennial grass species native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hordelymus europaeus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as tinctures, teas, and infusions, which can be taken internally or applied topically to utilize its medicinal properties.
